title: Turning Prototypes into Products - Developed a functional and a stable MVP version of Traddle.io
description: Traddle.io was an interactive trading platform for stocks and crypto where users can create communities, live track performances in the European Stock Market while simultaneously discuss within communities and trade together.

title: Scaling E-commerce Ecosystem for High-Volume Global Traffics
description: Redesigned the entire backend architecture using microservices to handle over 100k requests per minute during peak sales season reliably.
